Create an external target guide

Source: R/guides.R
guide_external.Rd

Steers a factor toward a fixed target matrix. Useful for transfer learning, prior knowledge, or cross-layer coupling.

Usage

guide_external(target, lambda = 1, side = c("H", "W"))

Arguments

target

Target matrix with dimensions matching the guided factor (k × n for H, k × m for W).

lambda

Guide strength. Positive attracts; negative repels. Default 1.0.

side

Which factor to guide: "H" (default) or "W".

Value

An nmf_guide object to pass to nmf(guides = ...).

See also

guide_classifier, guide_callback, nmf

Examples

# Create an external target guide
target <- matrix(runif(30), nrow = 5, ncol = 6)
g <- guide_external(target, lambda = 2.0)
g
#> nmf_guide: external (lambda=2.00, side=H)
#>   target: 5 x 6
